improvement: Normalize the Cloudflare verification manifest into seven R-007-compatible receipts and one R-008 SLSA Verification Summary Attestation.

verification.route: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed adapter and referenced Frontier contracts
covered: unsigned evidence yields a complete FAILED summary
all seven normalized passing receipts plus verified signature yield PASSED
unsupported statuses are rejected rather than silently normalized

limits: The generated verification summary is unsigned.
No Cloudflare deployment URL or deployed commit was observed in this run.
Receipt normalization does not prove the underlying deployment claim.
The aggregate ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
privacy_boundary: Contains only public repository paths, abstract verifier states, and test outcomes; no secrets, private chat, health material, diagnosis, or treatment claims.
